title: Central University of Student Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Central University of Kerala (CUK) Student Internship Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of the Central University of Kerala. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the CUK Student Internship Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Students in undergraduate engineering or postgraduate Science disciplines
qualification.details: Students in undergraduate engineering or postgraduate Science disciplines.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Central University of Student Internship Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
